subject: VPN connected but internal websites do not load
description: VPN client shows connected; browser times out on intranet URLs that worked last week.

ts_steps.title: Split tunnel check
ts_steps.action: Verify whether intranet routes are in VPN client routing table; disconnect/reconnect; try different VPN gateway.

ts_steps.title: DNS
ts_steps.action: ipconfig /flushdns; confirm VPN-assigned DNS; try intranet by IP if hostname fails.

ts_steps.title: Browser cache
ts_steps.action: Clear SSL state and cache; try InPrivate; rule out proxy extension blocking.

internal_information: Split tunnel policy, stale DNS, or corporate cert issue. Network team if routing missing for all users.
